commonCitations.wrongful_death: N.J.S.A. 2A:31-1 et seq. (Wrongful Death Act); N.J.S.A. 2A:15-3 (Survival)
commonCitations.medical_records_fees_hospital: N.J.S.A. 26:2H-5n ($1/p or $50/admission whichever less; $20 search fee)
commonCitations.medical_records_fees_physician: N.J.A.C. 13:35-6.5 ($1/p or $100 max; $10 retrieval if < 10 pages); N.J.S.A. 45:9-22.27
commonCitations.hospital_lien: No statutory hospital lien in NJ; common-law contractual subrogation; Medicaid recovery N.J.S.A. 30:4D-7.1 (Ahlborn allocation applies)
commonCitations.minor_settlement_approval: R. 4:44 (friendly hearing); N.J.S.A. 3B:12-36 (guardianship of minor's funds)
commonCitations.tort_claims_act_deadline_days: 90-day notice (§ 59:8-8); 1-year late-notice motion on extraordinary circumstances (§ 59:8-9)
commonCitations.contingency_fee_rule: R. 1:21-7(c) (33-1/3% on first $750K; 30% next $750K; 25% next $750K; 20% next $750K; over $3M by court order; 25% max for minor/incapacitated settlement without trial)
commonCitations.certificate_of_merit_medmal: N.J.S.A. 2A:53A-26 to -29 (Affidavit of Merit; 60 days + 60-day good-cause extension; equivalent specialty under § 2A:53A-41); Ferreira v. Rancocas Orthopedic Assocs., 178 N.J. 144 (2003)
commonCitations.damages_cap_medmal_noneconomic: No general cap; punitive damages cap N.J.S.A. 2A:15-5.14 (greater of $350K or 5x compensatory)
commonCitations.comparative_negligence_standard: N.J.S.A. 2A:15-5.1 (modified comparative; barred if more than 50%); allocation N.J.S.A. 2A:15-5.2
commonCitations.threshold_serious_injury: N.J.S.A. 39:6A-8(a) (AICRA verbal threshold / Limitation on Lawsuit option: death, dismemberment, significant disfigurement or scarring, displaced fracture, loss of fetus, permanent injury within reasonable degree of medical probability)
commonCitations.verbal_threshold_certification: N.J.S.A. 39:6A-8(a) (sworn physician certification of permanency, served within 60 days of answer)
commonCitations.mandatory_arbitration: R. 4:21A (mandatory non-binding arbitration for auto-tort and most non-malpractice/non-products PI; 30-day trial de novo demand)
commonCitations.offer_of_judgment: R. 4:58 (claimant or defense offer; fee-shifting and prejudgment interest if non-acceptor recovers less favorable result)
commonCitations.workers_comp_lien: N.J.S.A. 34:15-40 (employer/carrier third-party lien; statutory two-thirds reduction after fees + costs)
